title: Sight Words — Level 1
tagline: The 100 words that unlock first sentences.
description: The hundred most common words young readers meet, sequenced the way schools teach them. Each card includes a sentence starter on the back so practice feels like conversation, not a quiz.
benefits: Covers the 100 highest-frequency early reading words
Sentence starters turn drills into real conversation
Colour-banded levels show progress children can see
